name: Grilled Rainbow Trout W/Asian Flavors
recipeIngredient: 4 rainbow trout fillets, about 6 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, lightly brown and aromatize the ginger in oil.
2. Remove the pan from heat; stir in the red pepper.
3. When the oil has cooled completely, gradually whisk in the lime juice and peel.
4. Set aside the mixture.
5. Heat the grill and brush with oil.
6. Grill the trout flesh side down for 2 minutes.
7. Gently turn the trout.
8. Grill for 2 more minutes, or until the trout turns opaque.
9. Serve immediately with the lime-ginger mixture.
